title: Gorilla Super Glue Gel XL, 25g – All Purpose, Fast Setting & Thicker, More Controlled Formula, Ideal for Metal, Ceramics, Leather & More
features: HOW TO USE: Gorilla Super Glue Gel is a thicker and a more controllable formula than our original Super Glue. Due to the gel like consistency it requires shaking vigorously (with cap on) before each use to remix the formula. We also suggest tapping the bottle upside down on a hard surface to allow the gel to move towards the nozzle.

OVER 1.5X MORE: The same Gorilla Tough super glue gel, containing over 1.5 x more glue. For those looking for more use out of their super glue. Gorilla Super Glue Gel XL contains over 1.5 x more glue, meaning you get more to use on a variety of household projects.

NO RUN FORMULA: Gorilla Super Glue Gel is a thicker and more controlled formula of our Gorilla Super Glue. It’s great for multiple surfaces and vertical applications due to it being more viscous than our standard super glue.
FAST SETTING: Developed for long-lasting repairs in an instant. Our clear glue dries in 10-45 seconds but should be lightly handled after 60 seconds.
IMPACT TOUGH: Gorilla Super Glue is Impact Tough and formulated with an extra strong bond for increased impact resistance to handle bumps and drops.

ANTI-CLOG CAP: In addition to Gorilla Super Glue’s high-performance cyanoacrylate formula, the bottle features an anti-clog cap with a metal pin inside to ensure an airtight seal for maximum reusability. It’s Gorilla tough, every time.
FOR USE ON: Gorilla Super Glue is perfect for a variety of indoor household repairs. It can be used on wood, metal, ceramic, plastics*, paper, rubber & more!
*Not recommended for use on polyethylene (PE) or polypropylene (PP) plastics

specifications_table.Compatible Material: Ceramic, Metal, Paper, Plastic, Rubber, Wood
specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Impact Tough, High Viscosity, Fast Setting
